description: Available HDF5 fields for each field selector. Generated by enumerating actual granule HDF5 structure.

selectors.description: Per-photon fields from ATL03 heights group.

selectors.description: Geophysical correction fields from ATL03 (per-segment, ~20m rate).

selectors.description: Background photon rate fields from ATL03.

selectors.description: Land/vegetation segment fields from ATL08, including sub-groups.

selectors.name: atl09
selectors.description: Atmospheric fields from ATL09 calibrated backscatter profiles.

selectors.name: atl13
selectors.description: Inland water surface fields from ATL13.

selectors.name: atl24
selectors.description: Bathymetry-classified photon fields from ATL24 (per-photon, gtxx beam group).
